examples._comment: version, project_root, and kits are defined in core.toml and merged at load time. They may optionally appear here for standalone or legacy use.

version.description: Schema version. Normally defined in core.toml; may appear here for standalone or legacy use.

project_root.description: Relative path to the project root. Normally defined in core.toml; may appear here for standalone or legacy use.

kits.description: Optional in artifacts.toml — kits are normally defined in core.toml and merged at load time. May appear here for standalone or legacy use.

ignore.description: Global ignore rules (visibility filter) applied to all scanning/traversal operations.

systems.description: Root-level systems (top of the hierarchy tree)

kit.description: Kit ID to use for autodetected artifacts. If omitted, defaults to system_node.kit.

system_root.description: Base directory for system-scoped resolution (supports placeholders like {project_root}, {parent_root}, {system}).

artifacts_root.description: Base directory where artifact patterns are resolved (supports placeholders like {system_root}, {system}).

aliases.description: Mapping from directory token (system slug) to metadata overrides.

children.description: Nested autodetect rules for child scopes.

pattern.description: Single file path or glob pattern (resolved relative to artifacts_root).

required.description: If true, pattern must resolve to at least one file.

kits.description: Registry of kit packages. Each kit defines a template directory and format.

format.description: Template format identifier. Use 'Cypilot' for full Cypilot tooling support with validation. Other values are treated as custom formats with LLM-only semantic processing.

path.description: Path to kit package directory (resolved relative to project root, or to the named source root when `source` is set). Contains artifacts/{KIND}/ and codebase/ subdirectories.

artifacts.description: Optional explicit artifact template/example locations. Mapping KIND -> {template, examples}. Supports {project_root} token.

source.description: Workspace source name (v1.2+). When present, kit path is resolved relative to the named source's root instead of the local project root.

template.description: Path to template.md file. May start with {project_root}/.

examples.description: Path to examples/ directory. May start with {project_root}/.

slug.description: Machine-readable identifier (lowercase, no spaces, hyphen-separated). Used for hierarchical ID generation: {parent-slug}-{child-slug}-{TYPE}-{N}

kit.description: Reference to a kit ID from kits

artifacts_dir.description: Default base directory for NEW artifacts (relative to project_root). Does NOT affect existing artifact paths in 'artifacts' array. Default: 'architecture'. Subdirectories for specific artifact kinds (specs/, ADR/) are defined by the kit.

artifacts.description: Artifacts belonging to this system node

codebase.description: Source code directories belonging to this system node

autodetect.description: Autodetect rules (v1.1+). Each rule defines patterns to discover artifacts and codebase entries.

children.description: Nested child systems (subsystems, components, modules, etc.)

name.description: Human-readable name for the artifact (optional, for display purposes)

path.description: Path to the artifact file (resolved relative to project root, or to the named source root when `source` is set). Must be a file path, not a directory.

kind.description: Artifact kind (e.g., PRD, DESIGN, ADR, DECOMPOSITION, FEATURE). Template resolved at: {kit.path}/artifacts/{KIND}/template.md

traceability.description: FULL = traceability to codebase (default); DOCS-ONLY = documentation-only tracing

source.description: Workspace source name (v1.2+). When present, path is resolved relative to the named source's root instead of the local project root. When absent, path resolves locally (backward compatible).

name.description: Human-readable name for the codebase entry (optional, for display purposes)

path.description: Path to source code directory (resolved relative to project root, or to the named source root when `source` is set)

singleLineComments.description: Single-line comment prefixes (e.g., ["#", "//"]). If omitted, defaults based on file extension.

multiLineComments.description: Multi-line comment delimiters. If omitted, defaults based on file extension.

source.description: Workspace source name (v1.2+). When present, path is resolved relative to the named source's root instead of the local project root.
